name: pi-provider-cc-sdk
description: Use your Claude subscription with pi using their official Claude Code SDK.
readme:
# pi-provider-cc-sdk

Use your Claude subscription with pi using their official [Claude Code SDK](https://github.com/anthropics/claude-agent-sdk-typescript).

> Based on [pi-claude-bridge](https://github.com/elidickinson/pi-claude-bridge) by Eli Dickinson.

## Setup

```
pi install npm:pi-provider-cc-sdk
```

Requires `claude` CLI installed and logged in. Then `/reload` in pi.

## Usage

`/model` → select `claude-sdk/claude-opus-4-7`, `claude-sdk/claude-opus-4-6`, `claude-sdk/claude-sonnet-4-6`, or `claude-sdk/claude-haiku-4-5`.

Opus defaults to Claude Code's 1M-context variant when available (`opus[1m]` / `[1m]`).
